basics.name: Ingrid Solheim
basics.summary: Product and service delivery leader focused on digital operations, platforms, and transformation.

work.name: Northline Systems
work.summary: Owned a shared platform roadmap across operations and commercial teams.

Reworked intake and prioritization for a service platform, reducing decision lead time.

work.name: Fjord Mobility

projects.name: Platform operating model redesign
